idea-plugin.name: TermGlyph
idea-plugin.description:
A terminal tool window for IntelliJ-based IDEs that renders Claude Code cleanly — fixing the overlapping, hard-to-read text — and handles complex scripts (Thai, emoji) correctly.

It runs xterm.js (Unicode 11) inside the IDE's JCEF browser, giving you a familiar, fast terminal with:
  • Clean rendering — Claude Code's input box, borders, and dense output display without overlapping; Thai/emoji/wide chars compose correctly.
  • Find (Cmd/Ctrl+F), copy/paste, and a native right-click menu.
  • Multiple tabs plus native side-by-side split (Split Right/Down), like the IDE's own terminal.
  • Tab icons and titles that follow the running process (e.g. Claude Code).
  • Theme — follows your IDE editor color scheme; ANSI palette from Console Colors.
Works wherever the Web Browser (JCEF) plugin is available (IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate and most professional IDEs; installable on Android Studio 2026.1+).
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0 — first Marketplace release.
• Renders Thai combining characters (vowels/tone marks) and emoji correctly via xterm.js Unicode 11.
• Multi-tab terminal plus native side-by-side split (Split Right/Down/Change Orientation/Unsplit).
• Find in terminal (Cmd/Ctrl+F), copy/paste, native right-click menu.
• Tab icons and titles follow the running process (Claude Code, etc.); OSC title support.
• Theme follows the IDE editor color scheme; ANSI palette from Console Colors.
• Output batching, anti-freeze repaints, close-confirmation dialog.
